---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the PCVR toolkit
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Module
Which module would this affect? (new module, or enhancement to existing?)

## Use Case
Why is this feature needed? How would it help PCVR monitoring/analysis?

## Proposed Implementation
If you have ideas on how to implement this, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
Mockups, references, related projects, etc.
